# supportsTextEncoding()

**Instance Method**

Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether the web document supports text encoding.

## Declaration

```swift
func supportsTextEncoding() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the web document supports text encoding; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].
title: supportsTextEncoding()
